title: Capstone
compiled_truth: Capstone is an external contact at [Texas](companies/texas). Over the corpus period (2000-11-30 to 2002-02-06), Capstone sent 34 and received 9 emails, totalling 43 interactions. Top correspondents: [Bob Mckinney](people/bob-mckinney-capstone-ta) (13), [Mmaggi](people/mmaggi) (3).
